center.name: 巴拿馬省
center.summary: 巴拿馬省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括绿顶辉蜂鸟、麗色啄木鳥、One-colored becard等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Serranía de Majé of Panamá Province and in several ranges in the extreme east of Darién Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Panama in eastern Panamá, eastern Guna Yala (San Blas) , and eastern Darién provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Choco sirystes is found from the Panama Canal Zone and Panamá Province east and south through western Colombia into northwestern Ecuador as far as Los Ríos Province. It mostly inhabits humid primary and mature secondary forests in the tropical and lower subtropical zones, where it usually is found in the canopy but comes lower at the forest edge.R

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Panama on the Caribbean slope from Colón Province and the Pacific slope from Panamá Province and from there south into western Colombia's Chocó Department

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: viridiceps: Pacific slope from the southern Gulf of Nicoya in Costa Rica into western Panama; Caribbean slope of central Panama to Panamá Province The green shrike-vireo inhabits the interior and edges of humid evergreen and semi-deciduous forest in the tropical and lower subtropical zones. In elevation it ranges from sea level to in Mexico and northern Central America and to in Costa Rica

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in Panama, on the Caribbean slope in the Panama Canal area and Guna Yala (San Blas) and on the Pacific slope from Panamá Province east

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in central and eastern Panama, on the Caribbean slope in the Canal area, on both slopes in eastern Panamá Province, and in the Pacific lowlands in Darién Province. Its range continues south on the Pacific slope of Colombia's Western Andes at least to southern Chocó Department. One source shows its range in the country continuing all the way to Ecuador.{{cite book | last1 =McMullan | first1 =Miles | last2 =Donegan | first2 =Thomas M

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Panama from eastern Panamá Province through Darién Province into northwestern Colombia's Córdoba and Bolívar departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found on individual or abutting mountains from eastern Panamá and Colón provinces in central Panama to Darién Province and on both sides of Cerro Tacarcuna that straddles the Panama-Colombia border. It inhabits the interior and edges of montane evergreen forest and also elfin forest in the subtropical and lower temperate zones. In elevation it ranges overall between . In Panamá Province it ranges between and on the Panamanian side of Cerro Tacarcuna between . On the Colombian side it ranges between

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of green-crowned brilliant is found from Panamá Province in eastern Panama into Colombia, where it inhabits all three Andean ranges

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The splendid woodpecker is found in Panama along the whole Caribbean slope and from Panamá Province on the Pacific side and through western Colombia into western Ecuador.Chesser, R

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black antshrike is found in Panama from eastern Panamá Province south through Darién Province into northern Colombia
